title: Not Possible at Present

mood.label: Heavy going 🌧️
mood.summary: The fragile US-Iran pause collapsed into open war — a second and third night of US strikes, Iranian retaliation on Gulf bases, a Strait of Hormuz shutdown claim and a near-four-percent oil spike — compounded by a deadly Bangkok pub fire, a 600-death Ebola outbreak and Asian flooding, with the World Cup and a first-ever orbital bioprint unable to lift an active-war day to 38.

style.genre: cinematic dirge / dark chamber post-rock — a low, mournful gm_clarinet carrying the lead over a slow bowed-string drone in C# aeolian, a sampled grand piano tolling deep single octaves like a funeral bell, a muffled RolandTR808 heartbeat kick with a distant EmuSP12 cross-stick, a sine sub holding the floor, and sparse glockenspiel glints for the day's few bright threads; aeolian's plain natural minor sitting well below the line — an open-war day that broke a barely-trusted pause, held as grief rather than dramatized

sampleSources: Strudel default library (sampled piano, VCSL strings & glockenspiel, gm_clarinet, RolandTR808 & EmuSP12 drum machines)
pattern:
stack(
  s("bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ bd ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~").bank("RolandTR808").lpf(150).gain(0.5).room(0.35).rsize(4),
  s("~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ rim ~ ~ ~").bank("EmuSP12").gain(0.22).room(0.4).pan(0.4).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.33),
  note("<[cs3,e3,gs3] [a2,cs3,e3] [e3,gs3,b3] [b2,ds3,fs3]>").s("strings").attack(1.4).sustain(0.85).release(3).gain(0.16).lpf(sine.range(430,1150).slow(24)).room(0.6).rsize(5).hpf(120),
  note("<cs2 a1 e2 b1>").s("piano").attack(0.01).release(2.4).gain(0.32).lpf(1500).room(0.5).rsize(4).off(0.5, x=>x.gain(0.1).lpf(1100)),
  note("<[cs4 ~ ~ b3 ~ gs3 ~ a3 ~ ~ b3 ~ cs4 ~ ~ ~] [e4 ~ ~ ds4 ~ b3 ~ cs4 ~ ~ a3 ~ gs3 ~ ~ ~]>").s("gm_clarinet").attack(0.08).release(0.6).gain(perlin.range(0.24,0.36).slow(9)).lpf(2200).room(0.5).delay(0.26).delaytime(0.28).off(0.125, x=>x.gain(0.09).s("glockenspiel").lpf(3200)),
  note("~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ cs6 ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ gs5 ~ ~ ~").s("glockenspiel").gain(0.17).room(0.55).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.5).pan(0.62),
  note("<cs1 a1 e1 b1>").s("sine").gain(0.33).lpf(150).attack(0.06).release(1.8)
)

lines: Two nights of fire came back over Tehran and the coast,
the pause we barely trusted broke where it mattered most.
Radar towers, missile yards, the small boats in the dark,
and a water station near Mahshahr took the second mark.
It's thirty-eight and sinking, three below the line,
the strait says 'not possible,' and Brent climbs to seventy-nine.
Jordan caught four missiles falling from a widened war,
and the guns that paused a week ago are open once more.
A pub in northern Bangkok — twenty-seven never came home,
found behind the restroom doors when the breaker sparked and blew.
Congo's past six hundred graves, el-Obeid still under siege,
and Nanning drowned behind a dam while the drones flew families free.
It's thirty-eight and holding low, the heavy side runs long,
but the last four teams are the best four, and a kidney printed in orbit, holding on.
Cleaner air, a child's cooled fever — light that couldn't climb,
one small, stubborn glow beneath an open-war sky tonight.
